_meta.explanation: The rule 'In RectifiedFlowLoss with weighting='min_snr_5', the loss weight reaches its maximum value of 5/6 when the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) equals 5.' does NOT hold here. The model assumes SNR equals 5 at the cosine-sampled median timestep, but this timestep does not correspond to SNR = 5
_meta.curriculum_note: Rule 'In RectifiedFlowLoss with weighting='min_snr_5', the loss weight reaches its maximum value of 5/6 when the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) equals 5.' holds in the obvious case but breaks here. Distractor B is the hard negative — the rule naively applied.
